# jellyfin_metadata_configuration (Resource)

Manages the Jellyfin metadata configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jellyfin_metadata_configuration" "example" {
  use_file_creation_time_for_date_added = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `use_file_creation_time_for_date_added` (Boolean) Whether to use file creation time for date added.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier. Always set to `metadata` for this singleton resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import jellyfin_metadata_configuration.example singleton
```
